reason: CPU 不支持 LSE atomics(Armv8.1+),退回 ldxr/stxr 循环,DB 竞争路径性能显著降低 25-40%
recommend: 升级到支持 Armv8.1 的 CPU · 或确认 BIOS 未禁用 LSE atomics
fix: lscpu | grep -w atomics || echo 'BIOS 检查 LSE 开关或升级硬件'

source.title: 鲲鹏代码移植指南 · ARM64 原子指令与编译
source.quote: 鲲鹏 920 支持 ARMv8.1-A 的 LSE(Large System Extensions)原子指令,使用 LSE 编译的数据库在高并发场景下性能提升 15-30%

reason: mongod 二进制未编译带 LSE atomics(-moutline-atomics / -march=armv8.1-a),ARM64 上吞吐低于带 LSE 的构建
recommend: 换装 Percona ARM64 RPM · 或自编译 mongod 带 -moutline-atomics · 或使用鲲鹏 BoostKit 提供的优化版本

source.title: AWS Graviton Getting Started · C/C++ on Arm64 (LSE atomics)
source.quote: 发行版自带的 MongoDB 包经常没带 -moutline-atomics,在 ARM64 上吞吐腰斩

reason: ARM64 支持 4K 或 64K 页大小,大 buffer DB 场景可测 TLB stall 决定是否切换到 64K 页
recommend: 先用 perf stat -e stall_frontend_tlb,stall_backend_tlb 测 TLB stall · 再决定是否需要 64K 页内核

source.title: 鲲鹏代码移植指南 · 内核页大小
source.quote: 鲲鹏支持 4K 和 64K 页大小,大 buffer 场景下 64K 页减少 TLB miss

reason: CPU 调频策略在 powersave/ondemand 下,负载峰值因频率切换引入额外延迟,鲲鹏上尤其明显(TaiShan v110 P-State 切换开销较大)
recommend: echo performance > /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu*/cpufreq/scaling_governor · 或在 cpupower 里持久化

source.title: Linux Kernel Admin Guide · CPU Performance Scaling (cpufreq)
source.quote: 数据库生产场景要求 CPU governor 为 performance 以避免频率切换引入延迟抖动

reason: 鲲鹏 920 双路典型 4 NUMA 节点,开启自动平衡会导致跨 die/socket 内存迁移,引入远端访存延迟 30%+
recommend: echo 0 > /proc/sys/kernel/numa_balancing · 配合 numactl --cpunodebind 显式绑核

source.title: Linux Kernel Admin Guide · sysctl/kernel.html (numa_balancing)
source.quote: 鲲鹏 920 双路 = 2 socket × 2 SCCL = 4 NUMA 节点,与 x86 2 节点、Graviton 单节点不同,必须显式绑核禁自动平衡

threshold: 未运行 OR 未手动绑 NIC IRQ 到非 DB 核
reason: irqbalance 未运行时 IRQ 集中 CPU0 打满单核;或 NIC IRQ 未绑到非 DB 核导致 DB 线程被中断抢占
recommend: systemctl stop irqbalance · 然后手动 echo 91-95 > /proc/irq/$irq/smp_affinity_list 把 NIC 中断绑到非 DB 核
fix: systemctl stop irqbalance && for irq in $(grep <nic> /proc/interrupts | awk -F: '{print $1}'); do echo 91-95 > /proc/irq/$irq/smp_affinity_list; done

source.title: 鲲鹏 BoostKit · Redis Ring Buffer / IRQ
source.quote: 停掉 irqbalance,手动绑定 NIC IRQ 到非 DB 核(通常是 91-95 · 96 核鲲鹏示例)

reason: openEuler 内核 cmdline 不应出现 nohz=off · 该参数禁用动态 tick · 对 DB 负载无益反增功耗
recommend: grubby --update-kernel=ALL --remove-args='nohz=off' · 重启生效

source.title: openEuler · MySQL 性能调优指南(类推 MongoDB)
source.quote: openEuler 内核启动参数不应包含 nohz=off · 移除后 CPU 可正常进入 C-state 省电

reason: openEuler 专有 scheduler 特性 · sched_steal_node_limit 控制跨 NUMA 偷任务上限 · 未设或设为 1 在 4 节点鲲鹏上调度效率低
recommend: grubby --update-kernel=ALL --args='sched_steal_node_limit=4' · 重启生效

source.title: openEuler · 调度器 sched_steal_node_limit
source.quote: sched_steal_node_limit 决定跨 NUMA 节点窃取任务的最大距离 · 鲲鹏 4 节点建议 = 4

reason: openEuler 专有 STEAL 调度特性 · 在 /sys/kernel/debug/sched_features 启用后才能配合 sched_steal_node_limit 生效
recommend: echo STEAL > /sys/kernel/debug/sched_features · 运行时启用

source.title: openEuler · sched_features STEAL 特性
source.quote: 运行时通过 debugfs 启用 STEAL 调度特性 · 对 DB workload CPU 利用率优化明显

reason: 鲲鹏 SMMU(System MMU)开启时对 DB 类工作负载引入 I/O 转换开销 · openEuler MySQL 调优指南明确建议 BIOS 关闭
recommend: BIOS 设置 · System Configuration → SMMU → Disabled · 重启生效(surfaceable_only · shell 不可改)
fix: dmesg | grep -i smmu || echo 'SMMU disabled OK'

source.title: openEuler · BIOS SMMU 调优
source.quote: DB 场景建议 BIOS 关闭 SMMU · 降低 I/O 转换层开销

reason: 鲲鹏 BIOS CPU Prefetching 对 OLTP DB 随机访问模式造成 cache 污染 · 华为云博客明确建议 DB 场景关闭
recommend: BIOS 设置 · CPU Configuration → Prefetch → Disabled(surfaceable_only)
fix: 查看 BIOS · 不可 shell 改

source.title: Huawei Kunpeng CPU/Memory Tuning · BIOS Prefetch
source.quote: DB 场景 BIOS 关闭 CPU Prefetching · 避免随机访问模式下 cache 污染

reason: 鲲鹏 Hi1822 NIC 的 RX ring buffer 默认非最大 · 高并发 DB 网络场景下 packet drop 风险
recommend: ethtool -G <nic> rx 4096 tx 4096 · 持久化到 ifcfg 或 network-scripts

source.title: 鲲鹏 BoostKit · NIC Ring Buffer 调优
source.quote: Hi1822 NIC 最大 4096 ring buffer · 配合 combined queue ≥ NUMA 节点数

reason: MongoDB 3.6.13 requires the '/root' partition to be at least 100GB to ensure proper installation and operation. Insufficient space may lead to installation failures or performance issues.
recommend: Ensure that the '/root' partition is at least 100GB for MongoDB 3.6.13 installations.
fix: Resize the '/root' partition to meet the minimum size requirement.

source.title: MongoDB Installation Guide
source.quote: MongoDB 3.6.13在安装的时候，“/root”分区大小设置不小于100GB。

reason: A minimum of 50GB is recommended for the data partition to ensure that MongoDB can store its data files without running out of space, which could lead to data loss or corruption.
recommend: Ensure that the data partition is at least 50GB when setting up MongoDB.
fix: Create a data partition of at least 50GB for MongoDB data storage.

source.title: MongoDB Installation Guide
source.quote: 编译数据库以及挂载“/data”数据的时候，请尽量保证目录所在的分区大小不小于50GB。

reason: MongoDB requires the libyaml-devel dependency package to support configuration files in YAML format. Without this package, MongoDB may not function correctly when using YAML configurations.
recommend: Install the libyaml-devel package using the provided command to ensure proper YAML support in MongoDB.

source.title: MongoDB 移植&安装&调优指南
source.quote: MongoDB需要libyaml-devel依赖包来支持使用YAML格式的配置文件。

reason: The libmpcdec-devel package is necessary for MongoDB to support the Snappy compression algorithm, which enhances data reading performance. Without it, MongoDB may not utilize Snappy compression effectively.
recommend: Install the libmpcdec-devel package to ensure MongoDB can use Snappy compression for improved performance.

source.title: MongoDB 移植&安装&调优指南
source.quote: 安装libmpcdec-devel的作用是为了支持MongoDB的Snappy压缩算法。

reason: MongoDB requires CMake version 3.4.3 or higher for proper compilation. Using an outdated version may lead to compilation errors.
recommend: Upgrade CMake to version 3.4.3 or higher to meet MongoDB's requirements.

source.title: MongoDB 移植&安装&调优指南
source.quote: 为了确保编译过程中使用的CMake版本符合MongoDB的要求，需要升级CMake。

reason: GCC version lower than 5.3 may lead to compilation and installation errors for MongoDB.
recommend: Upgrade GCC to version 5.3 or higher to ensure successful compilation.

source.title: MongoDB 移植&安装&调优指南
source.quote: 为了避免编译和安装过程中出现错误，需要升级GCC。GCC版本要求5.3或者以上。若GCC版本低于5.3，需要升级GCC。

reason: PyYAML is necessary for correctly parsing and reading YAML configuration files in MongoDB.
recommend: Install PyYAML to ensure proper configuration file handling.

source.title: MongoDB 移植&安装&调优指南
source.quote: 安装PyYAML的作用是为了在MongoDB的配置文件中使用PyYAML库来正确地解析和读取YAML格式的配置文件。

reason: 确保MongoDB的特定版本已正确安装是数据库运行的基础，避免版本不兼容的问题。
recommend: 检查MongoDB版本是否为3.6.13，以确保使用的是推荐的版本。

source.title: MongoDB 移植&安装&调优指南
source.quote: 步骤4 安装MongoDB和MongoDB Tools的RPM包。rpm -ivh mongodb-3.6.13-1.el8.aarch64.rpm

threshold: contains dbpath, logpath, logappend, port, fork, auth, bind_ip
reason: MongoDB的配置文件设置影响数据库的性能和安全性，错误的配置可能导致数据丢失或安全漏洞。
recommend: 确保配置文件包含正确的参数设置，特别是dbpath和logpath。
fix: vim /etc/mongodb.cnf and add dbpath=/data/mongo, logpath=/data/mongo/mongo.log, logappend=true, port=27017, fork=true, auth=false, bind_ip=0.0.0.0

source.title: MongoDB 移植&安装&调优指南
source.quote: 2. 修改MongoDB的配置文件。...添加如下内容: dbpath=/data/mongo logpath=/data/mongo/mongo.log logappend=true port=27017 fork=true auth=false bind_ip=0.0.0.0

reason: 在数据库场景中，开启SMMU会增加额外的开销和延迟，从而降低系统的性能。
recommend: 在BIOS中将SMMU关闭以提升服务器性能。
fix: 在BIOS设置中找到SMMU选项并将其设置为禁用。

source.title: 调优指南
source.quote: 因为数据库通常会使用大量的内存和IO资源，而SMMU会增加额外的开销和延迟，从而降低系统的性能。因此在数据库场景，开启SMMU并不能获得更好的性能。

reason: 在数据库场景中，开启SMMU会增加额外的开销和延迟，从而降低系统性能。关闭SMMU可以减少系统的复杂性和维护成本。
recommend: 在BIOS中将SMMU设置为关闭。
fix: 进入BIOS设置界面，选择“Advanced > MISC Config”，将“Support Smmu”设置为“Disable”。

source.title: 调优指南
source.quote: 在数据库场景，开启SMMU并不能获得更好的性能。此外，关闭SMMU还可以减少系统的复杂性和维护成本。因此在鲲鹏平台，建议在BIOS中将SMMU关闭。

reason: 使用noatime可以避免不必要的资源浪费，而nobarrier可以避免write barriers的性能损失。
recommend: 在文件系统的mount参数上加上noatime和nobarrier选项。

source.title: 调优指南
source.quote: 建议在文件系统的mount参数上加上noatime、nobarrier两个选项。

reason: tcp_max_syn_backlog指定所能接收SYN同步包的最大客户端数量，增加此值可以提升连接处理能力。
recommend: 建议将tcp_max_syn_backlog修改为8192。

source.title: 调优指南
source.quote: tcp_max_syn_backlog是指定所能接收SYN同步包的最大客户端数量。建议修改成“8192”。

reason: net.core.somaxconn是服务端所能accept即处理数据的最大客户端数量，增加此值可以提升连接处理能力。
recommend: 建议将net.core.somaxconn修改为1024。

source.title: 调优指南
source.quote: net.core.somaxconn是服务端所能accept即处理数据的最大客户端数量。建议修改成“1024”。

reason: net.ipv4.tcp_rmem configures the size of the TCP read buffer. Adjusting these values can optimize performance for different network conditions.
recommend: Set tcp_rmem to '4096 87380 16777216' to optimize TCP read buffer sizes.

source.title: MongoDB Tuning Guide
source.quote: 配置读缓冲区的大小，共三个值，第一个是这个读缓冲区的最小值，第三个是最大值，中间的是默认值。建议修改成“4096 87380 16777216”。

reason: net.ipv4.tcp_wmem sets the size of the TCP write buffer. Properly configuring these values can enhance throughput for applications that send data over TCP.
recommend: Set tcp_wmem to '4096 65536 16777216' to optimize TCP write buffer sizes.

source.title: MongoDB Tuning Guide
source.quote: 配置写缓冲区的大小，共三个值，第一个是这个写缓冲区的最小值，第三个是最大值，中间的是默认值。建议修改成“4096 65536 16777216”。

reason: net.ipv4.tcp_max_tw_buckets limits the number of sockets in the TIME_WAIT state. Increasing this value can help manage more connections efficiently, especially under high load.
recommend: Set tcp_max_tw_buckets to 360000 to allow more TIME_WAIT sockets.

source.title: MongoDB Tuning Guide
source.quote: 表示系统同时保持TIME_WAIT套接字的最大数量。建议修改成“360000”。

reason: vm.swappiness controls the tendency of the kernel to move processes out of physical memory and onto the swap disk. A lower value reduces swap usage, which can improve performance for memory-intensive applications.
recommend: Set swappiness to 1 to minimize swap usage and enhance performance.

source.title: MongoDB Tuning Guide
source.quote: 值越大，越积极使用交换分区；值越小，越积极使用内存。将vm.swappiness设置为较低值“1”，以减少交换分区的使用。

reason: 启用 TCP TIME-WAIT sockets 的重用可以减少连接建立的延迟，提高网络性能，尤其是在高并发场景下。
recommend: 将 net.ipv4.tcp_tw_reuse 设置为 1 以启用重用功能。

source.title: MongoDB 调优指南
source.quote: net.ipv4.tcp_tw_reuse 允许将TIME-WAIT sockets重新用于新的TCP连接。●0：关闭（default）●1：开启。

reason: 设置本地端口范围可以确保足够的可用端口用于外部连接，避免端口耗尽的问题。
recommend: 将 net.ipv4.ip_local_port_range 设置为 1024 65535。

source.title: MongoDB 调优指南
source.quote: net.ipv4.ip_local_port_range 用于向外连接的端口范围。

reason: 在 Kunpeng 920 上，NUMA 布局需要将每个 mongod 实例绑定到特定的 NUMA 节点，以优化性能。
recommend: 为每个 NUMA 节点独立部署 mongod 分片，确保 CPU 和内存的局部性。

source.title: 亲和性与绑核 · 鲲鹏程序优化 · numactl --cpubind/--membind 在多 NUMA 节点架构下的绑定策略
source.quote: 建议部署(每 NUMA 节点独立 mongod 分片): numactl --cpunodebind=0 --membind=0 mongod --config /etc/mongod-shard0.conf & ...

reason: 在使用 NUMA 布局时，自动平衡可能会导致性能下降，因此必须禁用它。
recommend: 在启动 mongod 实例之前，确保禁用 NUMA 自动平衡。

source.title: Kunpeng 920 专属(BIOS + kernel 层)
source.quote: 必须先关自动平衡: echo 0 > /proc/sys/kernel/numa_balancing

reason: LSE atomics support is crucial for optimal performance on ARM64 architecture. If the CPU does not support atomics, MongoDB's throughput can be significantly reduced.
recommend: Check if the CPU supports LSE atomics by running the command and looking for 'atomics' in the output.
fix: Run 'lscpu | grep atomics' and verify the output.

source.title: ARM64 通用(所有 ARM64 适用) > 3.1 · LSE atomics 三连查
source.quote: 发行版自带的 MongoDB 包经常没带 `-moutline-atomics` 或 `-march=armv8.2-a+`, 在 ARM64 上吞吐腰斩。必查三件套: # 1. CPU 支持? lscpu | grep atomics # Flags 行应含 'atomics'(Armv8.1 LSE)

threshold: has 'LSE atomics supported' in dmesg log
reason: The kernel must recognize LSE atomics for MongoDB to utilize them effectively. If not recognized, performance may suffer.
recommend: Check the kernel logs to ensure LSE atomics are supported by the kernel.
fix: Run 'dmesg -T | grep -i LSE' and verify the output.

source.title: ARM64 通用(所有 ARM64 适用) > 3.1 · LSE atomics 三连查
source.quote: # 2. 内核识别? dmesg -T | grep -i LSE # 启动日志应有 'LSE atomics supported' / 'CPU features: LSE'

reason: The MongoDB binary must include LSE opcodes to leverage the performance benefits of LSE atomics. If no LSE opcodes are present, a different build must be used.
recommend: Check the MongoDB binary to ensure it contains LSE opcodes.
fix: Run 'objdump -d $(command -v mongod) | grep -cE '[[:space:]](cas|casa|casal|ldadd|swp|ldset)[[:space:]]'' and verify the count is greater than 0.

source.title: ARM64 通用(所有 ARM64 适用) > 3.1 · LSE atomics 三连查
source.quote: # 3. mongod 二进制带 LSE opcode? objdump -d $(command -v mongod) | grep -cE '[[:space:]](cas|casa|casal|ldadd|swp|ldset)[[:space:]]' # 应 > 0(通常数千条)· 若 = 0,换装带 LSE 的构建

reason: Setting vm.zone_reclaim_mode to 0 can help improve performance by allowing the kernel to reclaim memory from zones without considering the zone's locality, which is beneficial for MongoDB workloads.
recommend: Set vm.zone_reclaim_mode to 0 to optimize memory reclaim behavior.

source.title: MongoDB 通用 sysctl(官方要求)
source.quote:
| 参数 | 值 | 依据 | perf-kp-sql 规则 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `vm.zone_reclaim_mode` | `0` | MongoDB Prod Notes | `os.vm.zone_reclaim_mode` |

reason: A low swappiness value (1) minimizes swapping, which is crucial for MongoDB performance as it relies heavily on memory.
recommend: Set vm.swappiness to 1 to reduce swapping and improve performance.

source.title: MongoDB 通用 sysctl(官方要求)
source.quote:
| 参数 | 值 | 依据 | perf-kp-sql 规则 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `vm.swappiness` | `1` | MongoDB Prod Notes | `os.vm.swappiness` |

reason: Increasing vm.max_map_count to at least 128000 allows MongoDB to handle more memory mappings, which is important for performance in large datasets.
recommend: Set vm.max_map_count to at least 128000 to support large memory mappings for MongoDB.

source.title: MongoDB 通用 sysctl(官方要求)
source.quote:
| 参数 | 值 | 依据 | perf-kp-sql 规则 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `vm.max_map_count` | `≥ 128000` | Ampere Mongo | `os.vm.max_map_count` |

reason: Setting net.ipv4.tcp_keepalive_time to 120 seconds helps maintain TCP connections, which is important for MongoDB's network performance.
recommend: Set net.ipv4.tcp_keepalive_time to 120 to ensure stable TCP connections.

source.title: MongoDB 通用 sysctl(官方要求)
source.quote:
| 参数 | 值 | 依据 | perf-kp-sql 规则 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `net.ipv4.tcp_keepalive_time` | `120` | MongoDB Prod Notes | `os.net.tcp_keepalive_time` |

reason: Setting net.core.somaxconn to at least 65535 allows the system to handle more simultaneous connections, which is crucial for MongoDB performance under load.
recommend: Set net.core.somaxconn to at least 65535 to optimize connection handling.

source.title: MongoDB 通用 sysctl(官方要求)
source.quote:
| 参数 | 值 | 依据 | perf-kp-sql 规则 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `net.core.somaxconn` | `≥ 65535` | Ampere Mongo | `os.net.somaxconn` |

reason: Setting ulimit for open files to at least 64000 is important for MongoDB to handle a large number of concurrent connections and operations.
recommend: Set ulimit -n to at least 64000 to ensure MongoDB can open enough files.

source.title: MongoDB 通用 sysctl(官方要求)
source.quote:
| 参数 | 值 | 依据 | perf-kp-sql 规则 |
|---|---|---|---|
| ulimit nofile | `≥ 64000` | MongoDB Prod Notes / Ampere | (Phase 2 实装) |

reason: Using XFS instead of ext4 for the data filesystem can provide better performance for MongoDB workloads due to its advanced features.
recommend: Use XFS as the data filesystem for MongoDB to enhance performance.
fix: Format the data partition with XFS filesystem.

source.title: MongoDB 通用 sysctl(官方要求)
source.quote: | 数据 FS | `XFS`(不是 ext4) | MongoDB Prod Notes | (Phase 2 实装) |

reason: Setting the block device readahead to between 8 and 32 sectors can optimize disk I/O performance for MongoDB.
recommend: Set block device readahead to between 8 and 32 sectors to improve I/O performance.

source.title: MongoDB 通用 sysctl(官方要求)
source.quote: | 块设备 readahead | `8–32` sectors | MongoDB Prod Notes | (Phase 2 实装) |

reason: Using the startup flag 'numactl --interleave=all' can help improve memory allocation across NUMA nodes for MongoDB, especially in single-instance non-sharded scenarios.
recommend: Use 'numactl --interleave=all' when starting mongod to optimize memory allocation.

source.title: MongoDB 通用 sysctl(官方要求)
source.quote: | 启动 flag | `numactl --interleave=all mongod` | MongoDB Prod Notes(单实例非分片场景) | (Phase 2 实装) |

reason: The crashkernel parameter is crucial for reserving memory for kdump, which is essential for capturing kernel crash dumps. Incorrect configuration can lead to insufficient memory reservation, causing kdump to fail.
recommend: Set the crashkernel parameter appropriately based on your system's memory size to ensure kdump functions correctly.
fix: Edit /etc/default/grub to set GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX="crashkernel=auto" or a specific value like "crashkernel=1024M,high".

source.title: Kernel Parameters Configuration
source.quote: 对于CentOS 7.6操作系统，“crashkernel”参数值可以配置为“auto”，表示可以根据系统内存来配置crashkernel大小。

reason: Enabling hung task panic can help in diagnosing system hangs by forcing a kernel panic when a task is hung. However, it can also lead to system instability if not managed properly.
recommend: Only enable kernel.hung_task_panic when necessary to avoid potential system boot issues.
fix: Add 'kernel.hung_task_panic=1' to /etc/sysctl.conf and run 'sysctl -p' to apply changes.

source.title: Kernel Parameters Configuration
source.quote: 配置kernel.panic_on_warn=1参数会在内核发生警告时，强制系统崩溃，触发kdump机制。

reason: The vm.vfs_cache_pressure parameter controls the kernel's tendency to reclaim memory used for dentry and inode caches. A high value can lead to excessive memory usage by these caches, potentially causing out-of-memory (OOM) situations.
recommend: Consider reducing the vm.vfs_cache_pressure value to retain more memory for dentry and inode caches, especially if you observe high memory usage by these caches.

source.title: Memory Management
source.quote: vm.vfs_cache_pressure controls the kernel's tendency to reclaim memory used for dentry and inode cache. The default value is 100, and reducing it can help retain more memory for these caches.

reason: 设置OMP_NUM_THREADS为1可以限制每次作业的BLAS线程数与申请的CPU核数匹配，从而避免线程过多导致的资源限制问题。
recommend: 在运行Python程序时，建议设置OMP_NUM_THREADS=1以提高作业成功率。

source.title: 鲲鹏技术疑难问题分析手册
source.quote: 运行时添加OMP_NUM_THREADS=1命令限制每次作业的blas线程数和申请的CPU核数匹配。

reason: iostat await=50.0ms · 阈值 20ms
recommend: 磁盘硬件级排查(非 sysctl 可改)
fix: 检查磁盘类型(SSD/HDD)· 确认 IO 调度器 · 排查其他进程竞争

source.title: 鲲鹏 BoostKit · MongoDB 调优指南
source.quote: 磁盘 IO 延迟:磁盘 IO 延迟过高 · DB 检查点 / 日志写入受阻

reason: tcp_keepalive_time=7200s · MongoDB 建议 ≤ 120s
recommend: 让客户端快速感知断连,配合连接池回收

source.title: 鲲鹏 BoostKit · MongoDB 调优指南
source.quote: TCP Keepalive:空闲连接失效时客户端感知滞后,加剧连接风暴

reason: tcp_retrans=5.00% · 阈值 1%
recommend: 链路质量问题,非 DB 侧直接可修
fix: 排查交换机拥塞 · 检查 MTU / TCP congestion algorithm / 网络负载

source.title: Linux Kernel Networking · IP sysctl (TCP retransmission tuning)
source.quote: TCP 重传率:高重传率导致 DB 客户端连接超时 / 慢查询放大

reason: 当前 THP=always · 期望 never · khugepaged 内存碎片整理会产生硬中断,CPU sys% 飙升
recommend: 将 THP 调整到 mongo 7.0.5 推荐模式

source.title: 鲲鹏 BoostKit · MongoDB 调优指南
source.quote: THP 透明大页:mongo 期望 THP=never。 khugepaged 内存碎片整理会产生硬中断,CPU sys% 飙升。

reason: dirty_ratio=20% / dirty_background_ratio=10% · DB 场景应 ≤ 5/2
recommend: 让脏页持续小批量刷盘 · 避免集中 IO 风暴

source.title: Linux Kernel Admin Guide · sysctl/vm.html (dirty_ratio / dirty_background_ratio)
source.quote: 脏页写回策略:大量脏页积压后集中刷盘会导致写停顿(write stall)

reason: vm.max_map_count=65536 · Ampere MongoDB 调优指南要求 ≥ 128000
recommend: 按 Ampere/Mongo 最佳实践调高至 262144

source.title: 鲲鹏 BoostKit · MongoDB 调优指南
source.quote: vm.max_map_count:大 collection / 多 sharded 场景下会触达 mmap 上限,mongod 报 mmap failed

reason: vm.zone_reclaim_mode=1 · MongoDB Production Notes 要求 0
recommend: 禁用 NUMA 区域回收 · 避免分配时延迟

source.title: 鲲鹏 BoostKit · MongoDB 调优指南
source.quote: vm.zone_reclaim_mode:开启 zone_reclaim 会导致 WiredTiger 分配时优先回收本节点 · 引入意外延迟 · MongoDB 明确要求 0
